mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_emergency_drill WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY modified_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_drill WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_emergency_drill WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_emergency_drill WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY modified_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_drill WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_emergency_drill WHERE drill_type = #{drillType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY modified_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_drill WHERE drill_type = #{drillType} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_drill WHERE drill_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_emergency_drill ( drill_id, plan_id, drill_name, drill_type, target_dept, scheduled_date, participant_count, evacuation_time, status, score, location, target_time, scenario, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{drillId}, #{planId}, #{drillName}, #{drillType}, #{targetDept}, #{scheduledDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{participantCount}, #{evacuationTime}, #{status}, #{score}, #{location}, #{targetTime}, #{scenario}, #{notes}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_emergency_drill SET plan_id = #{planId}, drill_name = #{drillName}, drill_type = #{drillType}, target_dept = #{targetDept}, scheduled_date = #{scheduledDate,jdbcType=DATE}, participant_count = #{participantCount}, evacuation_time = #{evacuationTime}, status = #{status}, score = #{score}, location = #{location}, target_time = #{targetTime}, scenario = #{scenario}, notes = #{notes}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_emergency_drill SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_emergency_drill SET total_checklist = #{totalChecklist}, completed_checklist = #{completedChecklist}, finding_count = #{findingCount}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_emergency_drill WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND deleted = 0
